name: m16-gdn-chain-dvtiling
hardware: AMD Radeon Pro W7900 (gfx1100, 48 CUs, wavefront=32)
correctness_policy: T1 (self-consistent + KL-gated), adopted 2026-06-09 (human lead). Verify-path gate is KL<=0.05/top-1>=90% vs cpu_reference, NOT bit-exact exact_ar_match. See docs/MEGAKERNEL.md S5/S8.1/S9.4 and docs/TESTING.md S4.
change: dv-tiling: each chain-recurrence block now owns VTILE=4 consecutive dv columns (grid (num_v_heads, head_v_dim) = 4096 -> (num_v_heads, head_v_dim/4) = 1024 blocks). The per-(v_head,t) work shared across the tile is computed ONCE per block: q/k load, q_sum/k_sum warp reductions, q_scale/k_scale, and the beta/decay transcendentals (sigmoid + expf(-expf*softplus)). The 4 consecutive dv state writes into chain_recurrent_state[...+dk*head_v_dim+dv_idx] coalesce instead of being single strided floats. Per-dv math (kv_mem, delta, state update, out) is unchanged. VTILE=1 is the bit-identical unfused fallback for non-divisible head_v_dim. Only the chain kernel changed; the tree DFlash kernel is untouched.

correctness.microbench_oracle: scripts/gdn_chain_microbench.py vs numpy f32 delta-rule reference (cpu_reference): out_max_abs 1.07e-6, leaf(state)_max_abs 5.96e-8 -> KL << 0.05 (T1 gate met by 4+ orders of magnitude)
correctness.on_model: exact_ar_match=false under T1 (~1 ULP FP-reorder flips one verify token vs the AR-path decode kernel at the degenerate 1-token-prompt boundary). Baseline committed kernel = exact_ar_match=true (verified by stash+rerun). This is the documented T0->T1 trade, not a correctness regression under the project KL gate.
correctness.tests: 555 GDN/linear_attn/qwen35 pytest cases pass (34 skipped); tree kernel unchanged

measurement.rocprof_harness: scripts/mtp_verifier_rocprof.py --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode batched --decode-tokens 8 --candidate-budget 3 (gate off); CSV post-processed (helper exits 1 on exact_ar_mismatch, expected under T1)

owed: T1 cost: re-baseline AR tok/s and economics-relevant acceptance rate on REAL prompts before any MTP C_B/economics claim. The degenerate 1-token smoke cannot assess acceptance (0 accepts for both paths).
lineage: in-tree; follows the M16.5 GDN shuffle-reduction win (commit on mpt-dflash). Dispatch model re-confirmed by benchmarks/results/2026-06-09-hipengine-m16-dispatch-grid-sweep-retest.json (grid 4096=9.36us -> 1024=7.25us dispatch).
